must_detect.matched_text: Internal Memorandum: MNPI/PDPA Handling for Proposed Acquisition by Helio Vista Holdings Ltd.

Helio Vista (a Mainboard issuer on SGX-ST) has executed a confidential non-binding term sheet with Riverbay Partners Pte. Ltd. to acquire Luminex Marine Pte. Ltd.; no SGXNet announcement has been made—treat all deal specifics as MNPI under SFA ss 218/219 and SGX Listing Manual Rule 703.

Issuer-relative materiality: Preliminary modelling (with Mr. Desmond Khoo, CFO) indicates the acquisition could add ~6–8% to group EBITDA; this likely triggers materiality for Helio Vista and may warrant a trading halt coordinated with SGX RegCo immediately prior to signing.

Employment/PDPA: Draft headcount rationalisation schedules (28 roles in fleet operations) at Luminex are not stand-alone material but, combined with the acquisition, may be material; handle personal data via the PDPA business asset transaction exception with access limited to the clean team.

uncertain.reason: Legally relevant PDPA basis for sharing personal data in M&A, but not clearly covered by an allowed privacy-event marker rule.
